name: baseline-v1-4-preregistered
changeScope: semantic risk-anchor translation and geometric confidence

riskAnchorTranslation.policy: Preserve the VIX level implied by every v1.2 archetype; do not estimate anchors from historical outcomes.

divergentRiskPolicy: Translate the legacy risk threshold 0.40 through its implied VIX 28.8 onto the logistic scale; growth, inflation and credit thresholds remain unchanged.
penaltyPolicy: Retain v1.2 missing-feature and divergent-signal penalties after geometric confidence.
selectionPolicy: No archetype coordinate, confidence share, model threshold or gate threshold may change after train-gate evaluation.
evaluationPolicy: Generate the fixed candidate evaluation, bind its SHA-256 into a gate-v2 config, and inspect only the train-gate report unless eligible.
outerOosPolicy: No baseline, audit or NBER OOS report may be opened unless train gate v2 passes.
